channel.title: SPL - Rainier Beach Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Rainier Beach Branch

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple arts and crafts with their caregivers during the group time.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Understanding AI
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a presentation and discussion on understanding AI.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Fuel Your Business - Networking and Resource Sharing / Impulse su negocio - Establezca contactos y comparta recursos
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch

Are you a small business owner, entrepreneur, or aspiring startup? Join us for an engaging and informative networking and resource-sharing event.This program will be conducted in English and Spanish.-------------------------------------¿Es propietario de una pequeña empresa, emprendedor o aspirante a una startup? Acompáñenos en un evento dinámico e informativo de networking e intercambio de recursos.Este programa se realizará en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Multipurpose Room

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Mindfulness Tai Chi
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Rainier Beach Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for Tai Chi, a gentle, low-impact practice that improves balance, flexibility, and overall body coordination.

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn
